title: Create: Overclocked
description: Create: Overclocked is a modpack built around the Create mod, supercharged with Create: Clockwork and a collection of powerful addons
body:
## About
Want to build something great with **Create: Clockwork** but got stuck installing all the right mods?
Say hello to **Create: Overclocked** — a modpack made just for players who love machines, automation, and creative contraptions.

It’s built around the powerful **Create mod** and packed with the best addons like Clockwork, Trackwork, Create Crafts & Additions, Enchantment Industry, and more — all set up and ready to go.

Whether you're making detailed factories, trains, or mech, this pack gives you everything you need in one place.

## All Create Related Mods
- [Clockwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-clockwork)
- [Create Big Cannons](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-big-cannons)
- [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)
- [Create: Diesel Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators)
- [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry)
- [Create: Immersive TaCZ Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-immersive-tacz-integration)
- [Create Ore Excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation)
- [Create Stuff & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions)
- [Create Utilities](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-utilities)
- [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats)
- [Create: Crystal Clear](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-crystal-clear)
- [Create: Design n' Decor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-design-n-decor)
- [Create: Dynamic Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-village)
- [Create: Trading floor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-trading-floor)
- [Create: Metalwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-metalwork)
- [Create: Oxidized](https://modrinth.com/mod/create_oxidized)
- [Create: Power Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-power-loader)

## Other mods
Plus, it comes with fixes and performance optimizations, so you don’t have to worry about crashes or lag — just build and enjoy. Alongside that, there are extra mods to improve your gameplay experience that enhance immersion and make the world feel more alive.
